title: Resolution Authorizing the Honorable Caesar P. Perez in behalf of the Municipality of Los Baños to donate two (2) units of Foton-6 Wheeler Dump truck one each to Barangay Baybayin and Barangay Tuntungin-Putho purchased by the Municipal Government amounting to Two Million Six Hundred Thousand Pesos and 00/100 (P2,600,000.00).
